{{Quote|No problem. You don't want to tell me who paid you off, so I'll just take this weapon off the stun setting.|Harburik|<ref name="Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley">{{WEGCite|book=Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley|story=A Rebel Agent}}</ref>}}
'''Harburik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who was stationed in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He had a good impression of the [[CSPL-12 projectile launcher/Legends|CSPL-12]] [[Projectile launcher/Legends|projectile launcher]]. As Chief of Police, Harburik was the face of Imperial law and order in the [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Yes, I admit, I'm a hateful man. I hate Prefect Talmont and Governor Aryon for having more power. I hate this suns-blasted planet. I hate the sand, and the heat, and the stinking Jawas. But, most of all, I hate it when one of my men is placed in danger.|Harburik|<ref name="AED" />}}
[[File:Harburik_GG7.jpg|thumb|left|Harburik at work.]]
Harburik was a [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] speciesist, like many other Imperial officials. He particularly hated the [[Imperial Prefect]], [[Eugene Talmont]], because of his readiness to cooperate or accept bribes from [[Alien/Legends|aliens]], particularly [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. Harburik hoped to eventually replace the Prefect, possibly through an "accident".<ref name="Secrets of Tatooine">''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]''</ref> When some of his men were reported missing, following the [[Attack on Centa Sonhan's sail barge|Attack on Centa Sohan's sailbarge]], Harburik just assumed that they had been killed in a gravel storm.<ref name="The Storm's Edge">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010510a|text=The Storm's Edge|int=The Storm's Edge}}</ref>

Harburik was keen to take a hand in interrogations and investigations. His actions drew the displeasure of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], but also of his own command. Few of Harburik's troops held high opinions of their leader.<ref name="Secrets of Tatooine" />
